column9: New York NY (hybrid-friendly, relocation required); retrieval-layer-for-agents company (AWS/IBM/Snowflake/Databricks/MongoDB partners); excellent archetype + stack match (RAG 35% precision + LangChain + LlamaIndex + FastAPI + agents); 3+ yrs SWE vs Deepak's 2.5 mitigated by project depth; specific posting ID may 404 — apply via general FDE req if needed
